message:
fix(og): add display:flex to all Satori child elements and fix async params

Satori (Next.js ImageResponse renderer) requires every element to have
an explicit display property — without it, text nodes silently disappear
from generated OG images. Also fixes prompts/[id]/opengraph-image to
await the params promise (Next.js 15 async params convention) and
corrects the twitter-image height from 630 to 600 to match the
summary_large_image card spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
